---
title: "API Reference"
toc: true
---

# `aria_nbv` API Reference

This section is generated from Google-style docstrings in `aria_nbv/aria_nbv/`.
The published GitHub Pages build refreshes these pages via `quartodoc` in `.github/workflows/quarto-publish.yml`.

Prefer `aria_nbv.data_handling` for the stable typed data surface. The `VIN Core` entries document the model internals that sit behind training and inference.

{{< include _api_index.md >}}
